title: Tripple Baka Takeover
description: Turns every Villager related mob into a member from tripple baka :D
body:
![tripple baka](https://i.postimg.cc/0Q2pHdc9/tripple-baka.png)
REQUIRES OPTIFINE



This resource pack for JAVA edition turns every villager related mob into a member from tripple baka yippieeeeee :DDDDDD

Following mobs have a custom model:

villager (Hatsune Miku)
zombie villager (Zombie Hatsune Miku)
vindicator (Kasane Teto )
pillager (Kasane Teto SynthV)
evoker (Kasane Teto Mesmerizer)
evoker fangs (Baguette)
vex (small Akita Neru)
wandering trader (Akita Neru)
witch (Akita Neru Halloween edition)
iron golem (Shiteyan'yo)



Yep... exactly... uhuh uhuh.... yes.... aha.... 

anyway, enjoy :D
![miku teto and neru sitting on gras](https://i.postimg.cc/nzRwdLK2/tripple-backa.png)
